content:
Member-only story

4 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Before learning any JavaScript framework, you must learn these three methods of JavaScript, and your life will become easy. And the last one is very, very important.
Link for free (non-member) readers
Number one is filter.
Try it yourself:
Toggle the cart below and watch each method update live.

1. Filter
Suppose you have a list of users and from that you need to fetch active users, then you can use filter.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Three filters selected (first card filter)Filter will filter and return you a new array of only and only active users. It does not touch your original array, it just gives you a new one with the items that pass your condition.
const users = [
{ name: "Ali", active: true },
{ name: "Sara", active: false },
{ name: "Zain", active: true },
];const…
